title: Ubiquiti UA-Intercom-Viewer-3
description: The Ubiquiti Intercom Viewer is a display designed to connect to an access intercom. It allows you to view the camera image and remotely open the door. Using the built-in microphone and speaker, you can communicate. The display size is 5 inches. The intercom is powered by PoE Ubiquiti Intercom Viewer Plastic back cover with wall mount Dowels, screws
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (1) 10/100Mbps Power Power over Ethernet Yes, 48V DC Power type PoE PoE type PoE-In (only) Max. power consumption [W] 5
